incoming_email.subject: Double charge on order #12345
incoming_email.body: I was charged twice for order #12345 on my Visa ending in 4421. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately.

reply.body:
Hi Sarah,

Thank you for reaching out. I confirmed a duplicate charge of $49.99 on order #12345 and have initiated a refund. You should see the credit within 5-7 business days on your Visa ending in 4421.

Please let me know if you have any other questions.

Best regards,
Support Team

incoming_email.subject: charged twice fix this asap!!!
incoming_email.body: charged twice fix this asap!!! order 12345 my card got hit 2x

reply.body:
Hi Mike,

I'm sorry about the duplicate charge on order #12345. I've verified the issue and started a refund for the extra charge. The credit should appear within 5-7 business days.

Best regards,
Support Team

incoming_email.subject: Invoice question for March subscription
incoming_email.body: Can you explain the $29 line item on my March invoice? I thought my plan was $19/month.

reply.body:
Hi Alex,

The $29 charge reflects your Pro plan ($19) plus a one-time add-on for extra storage ($10) activated on March 3. I've attached a detailed breakdown. Let me know if you'd like to remove the add-on.

Best,
Billing Team

incoming_email.subject: Export feature crashes on CSV files
incoming_email.body: Every time I try to export my project data as CSV, the app crashes. I'm on macOS 14 and using version 3.2.1.

reply.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for the detailed report. This is a known issue in v3.2.1 affecting CSV exports on macOS 14. Our engineering team released a fix in v3.2.2 — please update via Settings > About > Check for Updates. If the crash persists after updating, reply with your project ID and we'll investigate further.

Best,
Technical Support

incoming_email.subject: it dont work when i export fix it
incoming_email.body: it dont work when i export fix it csv keeps crashing

reply.body:
Hi,

Sorry you're running into crashes when exporting CSV files. Please update to version 3.2.2, which includes a fix for this issue. Go to Settings > About > Check for Updates. If it still crashes, send us your project ID and we'll help right away.

Best,
Technical Support

incoming_email.subject: How do I reset my API key?
incoming_email.body: I accidentally shared my API key in a public repo. How can I rotate it?

reply.body:
Hi,

For security, please rotate your API key immediately: go to Dashboard > Settings > API Keys > Regenerate. The old key will be revoked within 5 minutes. Also review your repo history and remove any exposed credentials.

Best,
Security Team

incoming_email.subject: My delivery is 2 weeks late
incoming_email.body: I ordered on March 1 and still haven't received my package. Tracking hasn't updated in 10 days. This is unacceptable.

reply.body:
Hi,

I'm truly sorry your order is significantly delayed. I've escalated this with our shipping partner and initiated a replacement shipment at no cost, expected to arrive within 3-5 business days. You'll also receive a 20% credit on your next order. I'll personally monitor tracking and update you within 24 hours.

Sincerely,
Customer Care

incoming_email.subject: where is my stuff??? still waiting
incoming_email.body: where is my stuff??? still waiting 2 weeks now this is ridiculous

reply.body:
Hi,

I completely understand your frustration — waiting two weeks is not acceptable. I've escalated with our carrier and arranged a free replacement shipment arriving in 3-5 business days. You'll also get 20% off your next order. I'll update you within 24 hours.

Sincerely,
Customer Care

incoming_email.subject: Product arrived damaged
incoming_email.body: The laptop stand I received has a cracked base. I'd like a replacement, not a refund.

reply.body:
Hi,

I'm sorry your laptop stand arrived damaged. I've arranged a replacement shipment — no need to return the damaged item. The new unit should arrive within 5-7 business days. Please reply with a photo if you'd like us to file a carrier claim.

Best,
Customer Care

incoming_email.subject: Locked out of my account
incoming_email.body: I tried logging in too many times and now my account is locked. I need access for a client presentation tomorrow.

reply.body:
Hi,

I've unlocked your account. Please reset your password using the link I sent to your registered email. For future lockouts, use 'Forgot Password' on the login page or contact us before the 5-attempt limit.

Good luck with your presentation!

Best,
Account Support

incoming_email.subject: cant login help
incoming_email.body: cant login help forgot password and email not coming thru

reply.body:
Hi,

I've sent a new password reset link to your registered email (check spam/junk). The link expires in 24 hours. If you still don't receive it, reply with your account email and we'll verify manually.

Best,
Account Support

incoming_email.subject: Need to reschedule our demo
incoming_email.body: Hi, I need to move our product demo from Thursday 2pm to Friday 10am EST. Same attendees. Is that possible?

reply.body:
Hi,

Absolutely — I've moved your demo to Friday at 10:00 AM EST. Updated calendar invite sent to all attendees. Looking forward to showing you the platform!

Best,
Sales Team

incoming_email.subject: Cancel onboarding call
incoming_email.body: Please cancel our onboarding call scheduled for next Tuesday. We'll reach out when ready to proceed.

reply.body:
Hi,

Your onboarding call for next Tuesday has been cancelled. When you're ready to proceed, reply to this email or book a new slot at cal.example.com/onboarding. No charges apply.

Best,
Customer Success

incoming_email.subject: Enterprise pricing for 50 seats
incoming_email.body: We're evaluating your platform for our 50-person team. Can you share enterprise pricing and whether SSO is included?

reply.body:
Hi,

Thank you for your interest. Enterprise pricing for 50 seats starts at $45/user/month (annual billing) and includes SSO, dedicated support, and 99.9% SLA. I've attached our enterprise datasheet. Would you like to schedule a call with our sales engineer this week?

Best,
Enterprise Sales

incoming_email.subject: how much for team plan???
incoming_email.body: how much for team plan??? need 10 users

reply.body:
Hi,

Our Team plan for 10 users is $25/user/month (or $250/month total) on annual billing. It includes shared workspaces, admin controls, and priority email support. Happy to set up a 14-day trial — just reply to confirm.

Best,
Sales Team

incoming_email.subject: Dark mode for mobile app
incoming_email.body: Love the product! Any plans to add dark mode to the iOS app? It's hard on the eyes at night.

reply.body:
Hi,

Thank you for the feedback! Dark mode for iOS is on our Q3 roadmap and targeted for release in August. I've added your vote to the feature request. We'll notify you when it's available.

Best,
Product Team

incoming_email.subject: want dark mode pls
incoming_email.body: want dark mode pls eyes hurt at night on iphone app

reply.body:
Hi,

Great suggestion! Dark mode for the iOS app is planned for Q3 (August). I've logged your request. We'll email you when it launches.

Best,
Product Team

incoming_email.subject: Getting started — where's my welcome email?
incoming_email.body: I signed up yesterday but never received the welcome email with setup instructions. Can you resend it?

reply.body:
Hi,

Welcome aboard! I've resent the welcome email to newuser@company.org — please check your spam folder. It includes your setup guide and a link to schedule a free onboarding call. Let us know if you need anything else!

Best,
Onboarding Team

incoming_email.subject: no welcome email got
incoming_email.body: no welcome email got signed up yesterday where is it

reply.body:
Hi,

Sorry you didn't receive your welcome email! I've just resent it — check spam/junk too. It has setup steps and a link to book a free onboarding call. Reply if you still don't see it.

Best,
Onboarding Team

incoming_email.subject: Cancel subscription effective end of month
incoming_email.body: Please cancel my Pro subscription. I'd like it to remain active until March 31, then not renew.

reply.body:
Hi,

Your Pro subscription is set to cancel on March 31. You'll retain full access until then. No further charges will occur. If you change your mind, you can reactivate anytime from Account > Subscription before that date.

Best,
Billing Team

incoming_email.subject: Integration with Slack not syncing
incoming_email.body: Our Slack integration stopped posting notifications 3 days ago. We reconnected but messages still don't appear.

reply.body:
Hi,

I checked your Slack integration and found the webhook token expired. I've re-authorized it on our end — please disconnect and reconnect in Settings > Integrations > Slack. Notifications should resume within 15 minutes. Let me know if issues persist.

Best,
Technical Support

incoming_email.subject: Terrible customer service experience
incoming_email.body: I've been bounced between three agents over four days with no resolution on my billing dispute. I want to speak with a manager.

reply.body:
Hi,

I'm sorry you've had such a frustrating experience — that's not the standard we aim for. I've assigned a senior account manager (CC'd) to resolve your billing dispute within 24 hours. They'll call you directly at the number on file. Thank you for your patience.

Sincerely,
Customer Relations

incoming_email.subject: Need to change account email address
incoming_email.body: I'm leaving my company and need to transfer my account from work@oldco.com to personal@gmail.com. How do I do this?

reply.body:
Hi,

To change your account email: go to Settings > Account > Email, enter your new address, and verify via the confirmation link sent to personal@gmail.com. Your data and subscription transfer automatically. If you lose access to the old email, reply with ID verification and we'll assist manually.

Best,
Account Support

incoming_email.subject: urgent need to move meeting today
incoming_email.body: emergency came up cant do 3pm call today need tomorrow same time pls

reply.body:
Hi,

No problem — I've moved today's 3 PM call to tomorrow at 3 PM. Updated invite sent. Let us know if you need a different time.

Best,
Sales Team

incoming_email.subject: Nonprofit discount available?
incoming_email.body: We're a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit with 15 staff. Do you offer discounted pricing?

reply.body:
Hi,

Yes! We offer 40% off for verified nonprofits — your Team plan would be $15/user/month for 15 seats. Please reply with your 501(c)(3) determination letter and we'll activate the discount within one business day.

Best,
Sales Team
